/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/mnist.dir/torch.cpp.o -o mnist  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/include/libtorch/lib:/usr/lib/wsl/lib:/usr/local/cuda/lib64 /usr/local/include/libtorch/lib/libtorch.so /usr/local/include/libtorch/lib/libc10.so /usr/local/include/libtorch/lib/libkineto.a /usr/lib/wsl/lib/libcuda.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libnvrtc.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libnvToolsExt.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart.so /usr/local/include/libtorch/lib/libc10_cuda.so -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/usr/local/include/libtorch/lib/libtorch_cpu.so" -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/usr/local/include/libtorch/lib/libtorch_cuda.so" -Wl,--as-needed /usr/local/include/libtorch/lib/libc10_cuda.so /usr/local/include/libtorch/lib/libc10.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcufft.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcurand.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcublas.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcublasLt.so -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/usr/local/include/libtorch/lib/libtorch.so" -Wl,--as-needed /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libnvToolsExt.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart.so
